control_plane_version_range.why: Maintain the supported Kubernetes release window so control plane components stay compatible across the fleet.
control_plane_version_range.next_check: Compare kube-apiserver, kubelet, and controller-manager revisions before rolling changes.

watched_releases.why: The observability stack must stay on the curated chart bundle for consistent alerting on every cluster.
watched_releases.next_check: Validate the Helm chart version against the platform manifest and reconcile drift.

watched_releases.why: Critical operational controllers rely on the documented chart version to provide consistent automation.
watched_releases.next_check: Review the Helm release diff for platform/cluster-ops and certify the desired revision is deployed.

required_crd_families.why: Monitoring operators surface metrics and alerts through these CRDs.
required_crd_families.next_check: Ensure the CRD exists and every version is served on each control plane.

required_crd_families.why: Database controllers depend on this family to orchestrate storage volumes and bindings.
required_crd_families.next_check: Confirm the CRD is present and has the expected storage version before accepting workloads.
